advancement.enigmatic_legacy:abyssalHear: Slay the Ender Dragon and claim Heart of the Abyss
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:allSpellsto: Collect every unique spellstone. Would there have been a way to combine them all...
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:astralFruit: Find Celestial Fruit among treasures of the End City, and consume it
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:burnTheTome: Try and use ancient tome as a furnace fuel
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:cosmicScrol: Perform pilgrimage to The Architect's domain and become his devoted believer, earning the right to bear his mark and blessing
Equip the Ring and embrace the Seven Curses
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:desolationR: Forge The Burden of Desolation, and bear it
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:discoverRin: Discover or create your first Ring
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:etheriumGea: Create a full set of armor made of etherium
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:etheriumToo: Craft any tool out of etherium
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:forbiddenAx: Behead an enemy using Axe of Executioner
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:forbiddenFr: Consume The Forbidden Fruit and rid yourself of the curse of hunger
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:guardianHea: Slay the Elder Guardian and claim Heart of the Guardian
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:heavenScrol: Find or create Gift of the Heaven
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:infernalShi: Forge Bulwark of Blazing Pride, the ultimate tool of defense
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:theCube.des: Force all spellstones into a shape equally powerful and unnatural, creating Non-Euclidean Cube
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:theInfinitu: Acquire The Infinitum and become the herald of the Abyss
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:theTwist.de: Slay the Wither and create The Twist using Nefarious Essence
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:unholyGrail: Harness the power of Unholy Grail... but at what cost?
advancement.enigmatic_legacy:voidPearl.d: Claim the Pearl of the Void
book.enigmatic_legacy.landing_text: The vast lands lie ahead of you, full of secrets and mysteries to uncover.
death.attack.enigmatic_legacy.darkness.p: %1$s was devoured by the void darkness around %2$s
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.u: Lingering Potion of Ultimate Night Vision
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.ulti: Splash Potion of Ultimate Night Vision
message.enigmatic_legacy.abyssal_heart.u: The Heart of the Abyss rejects you, current Seven Curses wear percentage: %s.
message.enigmatic_legacy.animal_guideboo: Nope, this animal is not considered tamable.
message.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_ring.no_: The insomnia curse of the Ring of the Seven Curses prevents you from sleeping.
message.enigmatic_legacy.ender_ring.no_a: You need the Ring of Ender to do that.
message.enigmatic_legacy.extradimensiona: This Extradimensional Eye is not bound to any location.
The target is not in the same dimension as the bound location.
message.enigmatic_legacy.eye_of_nebula.n: The Eye of the Nebula found no target.
message.enigmatic_legacy.heart_of_creati: The Heart of Creation found no enemies to judge.
message.enigmatic_legacy.magnet_ring.no_: You are not wearing a Magnetic Ring or Dislocation Ring.
message.enigmatic_legacy.non_euclidean_c: The Non-Euclidean Cube found no structure to fold space toward.
Space folds, carrying you toward an unknown structure.
message.enigmatic_legacy.ocean_stone.not: You need more experience to call the storm.
message.enigmatic_legacy.ocean_stone.wro: The will of the ocean cannot reach this dimension.
message.enigmatic_legacy.xp_scroll.extra: Scroll of Ageless Wisdom returned all stored experience.
message.enigmatic_legacy.xp_scroll.mode_: Scroll of Ageless Wisdom switched to Absorption Mode.
Scroll of Ageless Wisdom switched to Extraction Mode.
quote.another_demigod_1: Another demigod wanders this forsaken land...
quote.another_demigod_2: Let me accompany you in your journey. Perhaps, you will manage that which others could not.
quote.another_eon_1: Another eon, another wanderer.\nAnother story to be told...
quote.another_eon_2: I will observe yours with great curiosity.
quote.appaling_presence_1: The shell is gone... but appalling presence will forever remain imprinted upon this realm.
quote.breathes_relieved_1: The world breathes relieved without the burdensome presence of that horror...
quote.countless_dead_1: Countless dead souls, merged into abomination of such terrible form that it defies description.
quote.countless_dead_2: The earth is stained by the very presence of this foul creature.
quote.death_may_1: Death may impede your conquest, but only broken will can halt it.
quote.demise_is_1: Demise is but a temporary inconvenience for a demigod such as you.
quote.end_doorstep_1: The doorstep of The End...\nsingle step now separates you from it.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.dee: Beneath the stone, old things still remember your steps.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.fir: An empty sky. A dead kingdom. How familiar.
This place burns, yet it is not the deepest wound.
At last, sight returns to the blind.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.low: You are closer to silence than you think.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.mid: The world is quiet now. Listen carefully.
quote.eternity_to_keep_1: You have eternity to keep trying. Do what it takes.
quote.horrible_existence_1: What a horrible existence...\nBrought back from the dead, only to be slain once more.
quote.horrible_existence_2: You must truly be devoid of compassion.
quote.i_wandered_1: Yes, I wandered those lands many times...
quote.i_wandered_2: A desolate reminder of everything that was, and all that could have been.
quote.immortal_1: You are immortal! Return and give that pitiful creature a demonstration of this fact.
quote.its_destruction_1: Its destruction is a small consolation...\ngiven the implications of its terrible existence.
quote.no_peril_1: Where there is no peril in the task - there can be no glory in its accomplishment.
quote.oblivion_rejects_1: Oblivion rejects you...\nmake use of such opportunity, while you still can.
quote.only_because_1: Only because you have fallen does not yet mean you backed down.
quote.perhaps_you_1: Perhaps, you will be the one to uncover the long-forgotten history of this land...
quote.perhaps_you_2: If so, I must bear witness to your accomplishments.
quote.poor_creature_1: Poor creature...\nThe last of her kind, bound to guard the godforsaken island...
quote.poor_creature_2: ...in the middle of nothingness. Lay her to the deserved rest.
quote.setback_1: A setback, but not a defeat.
quote.sulfur_air_1: Sulfur in the air, sharp scent of burnt rock and flesh...
quote.sulfur_air_2: This place is a Hell indeed.
quote.terrifying_form_1: ...its terrifying form is destructible, but not its soul.
quote.terrifying_form_2: It bears curse not dissimilar to yours...\nCurse of immortality.
quote.toll_paid_1: With the toll paid, you are free from the burdensome swell of hatred and sorrow...
quote.tortured_rocks_1: Tortured rocks, pale as bones, hanged up above infinite, all-consuming blackness.
quote.tortured_rocks_2: The End...\nis almost like a fever dream.
quote.violence_calls_1: Violence calls for vengeance.\nReturn, and dispense it!
quote.we_fall_1: We fall, so that we may learn how to pick ourselves back up.
quote.whether_it_is_1: Whether it is power, or redemption that you seek in repeatedly returning Wither from and to its grave...
quote.whether_it_is_2: ...at least, you give that damnable creature a purpose.
quote.with_dragons_1: With dragon's imminent demise, this place seems even more empty and purposeless than before.
quote.with_dragons_2: Will you wander those fractured, deserted lands...
quote.with_dragons_3: ...or return to the facade of sanity and liveliness the Overworld provides?
quote.with_dragons_4: Of course, we both know the answer...\nyou cannot resist exploring the unknown, be it now or later.
quote.you_will_endure_1: You will endure this loss, and learn from it.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.abyssal_heart.1: Generated after defeating the Ender Dragon while bearing the Ring of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.abyssal_heart.2: It floats where the Ender Dragon died.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.abyssal_heart.3: Only one truly tormented by the Seven Curses may touch it.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.abyssal_heart.4: You must spend 99.5% of your total playtime under the torment of the Ring of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.abyssal_heart.s: A heart born from the abyss of the End.
Accelerates you toward your line of sight.
Immune to fall and collision damage.
Press the spellstone key to activate the dash.
Wither and void damage taken is increased.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.animal_guideboo: While in your inventory, your attacks can't
Hoglins around you are rendered passive.
- Tamable animals stay neutral towards you.
Right-click any entity to see whether it is
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ascension_amule: Combines the traits of all seven Enigmatic Amulets.
Soul Crystal and Vessel recovery is handled by the Ring of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.astral_fruit.1: Can only be eaten by bearers of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.astral_fruit.2: Grants powerful regeneration, resistance, strength, and fire resistance.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.astral_fruit.3: The stars answer with a promise of forbidden vitality.
Piglins remain neutral to you, even under the Second Curse.
Piglin bartering rewards are increased by %s.
Killing any creature has a %s chance to drop %s extra emerald.
Only bearers of the Seven Curses may use this item.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.axe_of_executio: Has a %s chance to behead beheadable monsters slain with this weapon.
Each level of Looting increases beheading chance by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.blazing_core.pa: Immunizes you against fire damage and automatically extinguishes you.
Temporarily protects you from lava damage; staying in lava too long makes you overheat.
When hit in melee, deals %s fire feedback damage to the attacker and ignites them.
Most status effects last %s as long; fire resistance-like effects last twice as long.
Damage from aquatic creatures is multiplied by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.bloodstained_va: +%s Attack Damage per missing health percent.
+%s Attack Speed per missing health percent.
+%s Movement Speed per missing health percent.
+%s Damage Resistance per missing health percent.
These traits scale with how much health you are missing.
The closer you are to death, the stronger it becomes.
Only bearers of the Seven Curses can use this item.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.bulwark_of_blaz: A shield forged in unbearable pride and infernal flame.
Only bearers of the Seven Curses can raise it.
Extinguishes you while held, unless you are submerged in lava.
Attacks from behind while blocking deal increased damage.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.curse_transpose: 与任意除附魔书以外的附魔物品合成。
会消耗该物品，并将其全部诅咒附魔转移到一本附魔书上。
只有承受七咒之人才能使用该物品。
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing11: §dSeven blessings will reward those who withstand:
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing18: §5- You can create and use unique relics.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing3: §dSeven curses will befall whoever bears it:
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing4: §5- You receive double damage from §6ANY§5 source.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing5: §5- Neutral creatures are aggressive towards you.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing7: §5- Monsters receive §6%1$s§5 less damage from you.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing8: §5- When on fire, you burn forever.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing9: §5- Every death tears your soul apart.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore1: §5Once forged by antediluvian god, it beckons
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore2: §5mortals and higher beings alike with promise
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore4: §5Be it arrogance or ignorance that leads them
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore5: §5to believe they can harness ring's power,
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore6: §5both are paid for in suffering the extent of
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_ones_onl: Only those bearing the curse may comprehend its purpose.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_scroll.1: Grants bonuses based on the number of curse enchantments on your equipped items.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_scroll.2: Main hand, off hand, armor, and Curios equipment are counted.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_scroll.3: Each curse enchantment counts as %s entry, regardless of its level.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_scroll.4: The Ring of the Seven Curses counts as %s additional curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_scroll.c: Only bearers of the Seven Curses may use this item.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_sufferin: You need to spend %s of your total playtime under the torment of the Ring of the Seven Curses to use this item.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.dislocation_rin: Instantly collects nearby items within %s blocks.
Cannot be worn together with a Magnetic Ring.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.eldritch_amulet: A perfected amulet willingly made impure.
Creatures caught in your gaze receive %s.
Creatures caught in your gaze receive %s.
Items bearing Curse of Vanishing are still lost.
Creatures caught in your gaze receive %s.
Gaze range: %s blocks, effect radius: %s blocks.
It inherits the full power of the Ascension Amulet.
It also turns your contempt into pressure within your gaze.
A perfected amulet corrupted by the abyss.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enchanter_pearl: Allows the bearer to carry more magical trinkets.
The extra slot exists only while this pearl is equipped.
Only bearers of the Seven Curses can use this item.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enchantment_tra: Craft it with any enchanted item.
It consumes the item and transfers all of its enchantments onto an enchanted book.
Knowledge is never lost. It merely finds another vessel.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_ring1: Allows access to your Ender Chest while equipped.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_ring2: Press the keybind or use the inventory button.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.1: A blade made to bring an end to those who dwell in The End.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.2: Its edge hungers for ender flesh.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.3: Deals %s damage against dwellers of The End.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.4: Deals %s knockback against dwellers of The End.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.5: Suppresses teleportation of Endermen and Shulkers.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.6: Suppresses Ender Pearls, Recall Potions, Twisted Mirror,
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.7: Eye of the Nebula and Non-Euclidean Cube when striking players.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_slayer.8: In The End, fully charged strikes against Endermen become devastating.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_amule: A relic marked by an unknown force.
Only one amulet may answer your call.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.a: The Eye has awakened, and now it sees.
Only the awakened Eye can be equipped.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.d: Some things are better left unseen.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.eternallyBound1: §5Once worn, it becomes a part of you.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.eternallyBound2: §4This ring will persist with you forever.
§6With the power of god, you can unequip it.
Set effect: creates a powerful shield while below 40% health.
While active, the shield grants 50% damage resistance.
Creatures that attack you are knocked back.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.etherium_axe.1: A waraxe forged from etherium, lighter than an ordinary axe.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.etherium_pickax: Area mining does not trigger while sneaking.
Sneak-right-click to toggle the area mining effect.
Area mining is enabled by default.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.etherium_shovel: Area mining does not trigger while sneaking.
Sneak-right-click to toggle the area mining effect.
Area mining is enabled by default.
The active ability will not trigger while holding a shield in the offhand.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.evilEssence1: Embodies raw, unrefined energy torn out
This piglin-neutralizing effect fails for bearers of the Seven Curses.
Piglins regard the wearer as one bearing gold.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.extradimensiona: Hold Shift and right-click to bind your current location.
Left-click a creature with it to teleport the target to the bound location.
It only works when the target is in the same dimension as the bound location.
This item is consumed on use.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.eye_of_nebula.a: Teleports you behind the creature you are looking at.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.eye_of_nebula.p: Has a %s chance to teleport away when attacked, avoiding that damage.
After using its active ability, your next attack deals %s additional damage.
Prevents fall-type teleportation damage after its own teleportation.
While in water, all damage taken is doubled.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.fabulous_scroll: Grants you the ability of free flight.
Flight does not consume experience within range of an active beacon.
Compensates mining speed loss while flying and negates fall damage while flight remains available.

feel hunger, but any form of
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.golem_heart.7: Immune to crushing and piercing environmental damage.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.golem_heart.8: Magic damage taken is multiplied by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.guardian_heart1: While in your hotbar, looking at a monster within %s blocks turns it against nearby monsters.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.guardian_heart2: Nearby monsters within %s blocks will retaliate against the marked creature.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.heart_of_creati: Calls lightning upon all enemies within %s blocks, dealing %s damage and applying %s.

tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.heaven_scroll.2: Flying slowly consumes experience and increases mining speed.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.heaven_scroll.3: Leaving beacon range removes flight and grants Slow Falling for %s seconds.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.heaven_scroll.4: While beacon-powered flight is available, negates fall damage.

receive within %1$s blocks from you is redirected
If Guide to Animal Companionship is also
possessed, redirected damage is reduced by %1$s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.magic_quartz_ri: Nether quartz and lapis lazuli guide a stable magical ward.
When worn, it improves your defense and luck while weakening some magical damage.
Only one Magic Quartz Ring can be worn at a time.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.majestic_elytra: A refined pair of wings with immense durability.
Hold jump while gliding to boost forward.
Can be repaired with Etherium Ingots.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.mega_sponge.1: Automatically absorbs nearby water while equipped.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.mending_mixture: Fully repairs a damaged item when combined with it in a crafting grid.
The repaired item keeps its enchantments, name, and other data.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.monster_charm.1: Increases damage dealt to undead enemies by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.monster_charm.2: Increases damage dealt to hostile creatures by %s.

When taking non-projectile damage, gradually applies %s to the attacker.
Grants a random positive effect when you defeat a creature, excluding Slow Falling.

Grants water breathing, underwater night vision and greatly improves underwater mining.
Increases swimming speed by %s and negates underwater gravity.
Makes you more vulnerable to fire damage.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.recall_potion.1: Drink to return to your respawn point.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.recall_potion.2: When used in the End, teleports you near the main island platform.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.redemption_poti: Drink to cleanse all harmful effects, including the Forbidden Fruit.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.soulCrystal1: Recover this crystal after death to
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.soulCrystal2: restore one of your lost Soul Crystals.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.storageCrystal1: Contains items and experience lost on death.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.the_acknowledgm: The Fourth Curse is weakened by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.the_infinitum.1: The abyss returns even the boldest gaze.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.the_infinitum.9: When held, provides %s Chance that otherwise
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.the_twist.1: On a path to take it all away,
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.the_twist.2: there can be no better way of knowing...
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.twisted_heart.a: Activated by the Ring of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.twisted_mirror1: Returns you to your spawn point.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.twisted_mirror3: Requires the Ring of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.unholy_grail1: Drink from it to draw upon forbidden power.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.unholy_grail2: The unworthy will suffer for their arrogance.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.unwitnessed_amu: An amulet without witness, name, or fate.
It waits to be claimed by a mortal soul.
Right-click to reveal its true color.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.void_pearl.pass: You no longer need to breathe air and become immune to drowning damage.
Removes almost all status effects, except special effects such as Forbidden Fruit.
Your attacks inflict %s on the target.
Every %s seconds, deals %s damage to creatures exposed to darkness within %s blocks and applies %s.

tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.voracious_pan.1: A cursed pan that devours strength from those it strikes.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.voracious_pan.2: It can also be raised to block incoming attacks.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.voracious_pan.3: Holding it for too long awakens a growing hunger.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.voracious_pan.4: The pan remembers every distinct creature it devours.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.voracious_pan.d: Each unique kill grants %s Attack Damage.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.voracious_pan.k: The pan can grow no further.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.voracious_pan.l: Restores %s of damage dealt as health.

Points toward the nearest Soul Crystal in the current dimension.

Press the scroll key to enable or disable the scroll.
While active, collects experience orbs within %s blocks.
